name: Janux Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I . Unless the context otherwise requires, the terms Janux Therapeutics, Janux, we, us, our and similar references in this Annual Report on Form 10-K refer to Janux Therapeutics, Inc. Overview We are an innovative clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing a broad pipeline of novel immunotherapies by applying our proprietary technologies to our Tumor Activated T Cell Engager (TRACTr), Tumor Activated Immunomodulator (TRACIr), and Adaptive Immune Response Modulator (ARM) platforms. ...
